title: story(impl): author cloud/firestore-tenants Terraform module — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Author the `cloud/firestore-tenants` reusable Terraform module: Firestore Native database, per-collection indexes (`tenants`, `share-grants`, `share-audit`), and IAM bindings for tenant-registry and share-service service accounts (append-only on `share-audit`).

### Component(s) touched

- [firestore-tenants](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/firestore-tenants.md)

### Design source

- Component design: see component link above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0001](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0001-tenant-state-storage.md) — tenant state storage; [ADR-0003](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0003-share-grants.md) — share grants
- TR(s) realized: TR-01, TR-04, TR-05, TR-06, TR-07

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Module exposes `database_name` and `collections` outputs.
- [ ] `google_firestore_database` is Native mode; per-collection indexes per query path declared.
- [ ] IAM bindings: tenant-registry SA RW on `tenants`; share-service SA RW on `share-grants`, append-only on `share-audit`.
- [ ] `create_before_destroy` lifecycle set; provider pinned to GCP v7.11.0.
- [ ] `terraform fmt -recursive -check` passes.

### Prerequisite tasks

- None.

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow — one invocation per task. The plan will identify files to touch, tests to write, and verification steps, tailored to a Terraform-module task.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)

title: story(impl): author cloud/media-bucket Terraform module — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Author the `cloud/media-bucket` reusable Terraform module: multi-region GCS bucket with versioning + uniform bucket-level access, IAM for `photo-store-sa` (object create/get/delete) and `share-service-sa` (signed-URL minting), and 90-day version-deletion lifecycle rule.

### Component(s) touched

- [media-bucket](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/media-bucket.md)

### Design source

- Component design: see component link above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0002](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0002-media-storage.md) — media storage
- TR(s) realized: TR-01, TR-02

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Module exposes `bucket_name` output.
- [ ] Bucket has versioning + UBLA enabled.
- [ ] IAM bindings scoped to required actions only for each SA.
- [ ] 90-day version-deletion lifecycle rule present.
- [ ] `create_before_destroy` lifecycle set; provider pinned to GCP v7.11.0.
- [ ] `terraform fmt -recursive -check` passes.

### Prerequisite tasks

- None.

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow — one invocation per task. The plan will identify files to touch, tests to write, and verification steps, tailored to a Terraform-module task.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)

title: story(impl): add tenant-registry Firestore schema and service.tenants client — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Define the `TenantRecord` schema (tenant_id, display_name, state enum {provisioning, active, evicted}, created_at, updated_at) and implement `services/tenant-registry/service/` Firestore client covering create/get/update/list/soft-delete operations.

### Component(s) touched

- [tenant-registry](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/tenant-registry.md)

### Design source

- Component design: see component link above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0001](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0001-tenant-state-storage.md) — tenant state storage
- TR(s) realized: TR-04, TR-05

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `TenantRecord` defined as protobuf and round-trips through marshal/unmarshal.
- [ ] Service client supports create, get, update (display_name + state), list (paged), soft-delete (state=evicted).
- [ ] Unit tests cover all client paths against a Firestore emulator or fake.

### Prerequisite tasks

- None.

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow — one invocation per task. The plan will identify files to touch, tests to write, and verification steps, tailored to a Go-service-with-Firestore-client task.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)

title: story(impl): wire tenant-registry HTTP endpoints — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Implement `services/tenant-registry/endpoint/` chi handlers for `POST /api/v1/tenants`, `GET /api/v1/tenants/{id}`, `PATCH /api/v1/tenants/{id}`, `DELETE /api/v1/tenants/{id}` (soft-delete), and `GET /api/v1/tenants` (paged), using `pkg/errorpb` for error responses.

### Component(s) touched

- [tenant-registry](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/tenant-registry.md)

### Design source

- Component design: see component link above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0001](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0001-tenant-state-storage.md) — tenant state storage
- TR(s) realized: TR-04, TR-05

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] All 5 endpoints respond with documented status codes; content-type `application/x-protobuf`.
- [ ] Validation errors returned as `application/problem+protobuf` via `pkg/errorpb`.
- [ ] Unit tests cover validation paths; integration test exercises an end-to-end round-trip.

### Prerequisite tasks

- story(impl): add tenant-registry Firestore schema and service.tenants client — self-hosted-personal-media-storage

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow — one invocation per task. The plan will identify files to touch, tests to write, and verification steps, tailored to a Go-service-endpoint task.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)

title: story(impl): deploy tenant-registry to Cloud Run with SA and module wiring — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Provision the `tenant-registry-sa` service account and root-module composition that consumes `cloud/firestore-tenants`, deploys the tenant-registry Cloud Run service behind the platform HTTPS load balancer, and configures the health check on `HTTP_PORT`.

### Component(s) touched

- [tenant-registry](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/tenant-registry.md)
- [firestore-tenants](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/firestore-tenants.md)

### Design source

- Component design: see component links above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0001](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0001-tenant-state-storage.md) — tenant state storage
- TR(s) realized: TR-01

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `tenant-registry-sa` SA created with read/write on the `tenants` collection only.
- [ ] Cloud Run service definition lints clean; health check uses `HTTP_PORT`.
- [ ] `terraform fmt -recursive -check` passes; dry-run plan applies cleanly.

### Prerequisite tasks

- story(impl): author cloud/firestore-tenants Terraform module — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
- story(impl): wire tenant-registry HTTP endpoints — self-hosted-personal-media-storage

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow — one invocation per task. The plan will identify files to touch, tests to write, and verification steps, tailored to a Cloud-Run-deployment task.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)

title: story(impl): add photo-store GCS client and object naming — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Implement `services/photo-store/service/` GCS client with object naming `{tenant_id}/{ulid}.{ext}` and per-tenant prefix isolation enforcement (cross-tenant access fails closed).

### Component(s) touched

- [photo-store](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/photo-store.md)

### Design source

- Component design: see component link above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0002](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0002-media-storage.md) — media storage
- TR(s) realized: TR-01, TR-02

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Service client supports put/get/delete/list keyed by tenant prefix.
- [ ] Object names follow `{tenant_id}/{ulid}.{ext}` convention.
- [ ] Unit tests assert per-tenant isolation: cross-tenant requests are denied.

### Prerequisite tasks

- None.

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow — one invocation per task. The plan will identify files to touch, tests to write, and verification steps, tailored to a Go-service-with-GCS-client task.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)

title: story(impl): wire photo-store HTTP endpoints with tenant-registry validation — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Implement `services/photo-store/endpoint/` chi handlers for `POST /api/v1/media` (multipart upload), `GET /api/v1/media/{object_id}`, `DELETE /api/v1/media/{object_id}`, and `GET /api/v1/media?tenant_id=...` (paged). Tenant ID is validated against tenant-registry before any object I/O; fetch honors a valid share-grant bearer.

### Component(s) touched

- [photo-store](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/photo-store.md)
- [tenant-registry](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/tenant-registry.md)

### Design source

- Component design: see component links above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0002](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0002-media-storage.md) — media storage
- TR(s) realized: TR-01, TR-02

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] All 4 endpoints respond per design; protobuf round-trip green.
- [ ] Tenant-id validation rejects unknown/evicted tenants with `application/problem+protobuf`.
- [ ] Integration test covers upload-fetch-delete round-trip with a stub tenant-registry.

### Prerequisite tasks

- story(impl): add photo-store GCS client and object naming — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
- story(impl): wire tenant-registry HTTP endpoints — self-hosted-personal-media-storage

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow — one invocation per task. The plan will identify files to touch, tests to write, and verification steps, tailored to a Go-service-endpoint task with cross-service validation.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)

title: story(impl): add share-service Firestore schemas and clients (share-grants, share-audit) — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Define grant and audit-event record types (per `share-grants` and `share-audit` collections) and implement `services/share-service/service/` Firestore clients. The audit client is append-only — no update or delete paths.

### Component(s) touched

- [share-service](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/share-service.md)

### Design source

- Component design: see component link above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0003](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0003-share-grants.md) — share grants
- TR(s) realized: TR-03, TR-06, TR-07

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Grant record (grant_id, tenant_id, grantee_id, object_id, expires_at, state) and audit-event record (event_id, grant_id, event_type, actor, at) defined as protobuf.
- [ ] Grant client supports create/get/list/revoke; audit client exposes append only.
- [ ] Unit tests cover grant CRUD + audit append; ensure audit client cannot update or delete.

### Prerequisite tasks

- None.

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow — one invocation per task. The plan will identify files to touch, tests to write, and verification steps, tailored to a Go-service-with-Firestore-client task.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)

title: story(impl): wire share-service HTTP endpoints including signed-URL minting — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Implement `services/share-service/endpoint/` chi handlers for `POST /api/v1/shares` (mint), `GET /api/v1/shares/{grant_id}`, `DELETE /api/v1/shares/{grant_id}` (revoke), `GET /api/v1/shares/{grant_id}/url` (return signed URL against media bucket), and `GET /api/v1/shares?tenant_id=...` (list). Revoke writes a `revoked` audit event; signed-URL writes an `accessed` audit event.

### Component(s) touched

- [share-service](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/share-service.md)
- [media-bucket](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/media-bucket.md)

### Design source

- Component design: see component links above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0003](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0003-share-grants.md) — share grants
- TR(s) realized: TR-03, TR-06, TR-07

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] All 5 endpoints respond per design; protobuf round-trip green.
- [ ] Revoke and signed-URL paths produce the expected audit-collection entries.
- [ ] Signed URLs are short-lived and validate against bucket IAM.
- [ ] Integration test covers grant -> access -> revoke flow.

### Prerequisite tasks

- story(impl): add share-service Firestore schemas and clients (share-grants, share-audit) — self-hosted-personal-media-storage

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow — one invocation per task. The plan will identify files to touch, tests to write, and verification steps, tailored to a Go-service-endpoint task with signed-URL minting.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)
